_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "riverpod_storage" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "data" TEXT NOT NULL, "expire_at" INTEGER NULL, "destroy_key" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("key"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "libraries" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "library_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES libraries (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "original_name" TEXT NULL, "localized_name" TEXT NULL, "sort_name" TEXT NULL, "format" TEXT NOT NULL, "pages" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "word_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "min_hours_to_read" INTEGER NULL, "max_hours_to_read" INTEGER NULL, "avg_hours_to_read" REAL NULL, "primary_color" TEXT NULL, "secondary_color" TEXT NULL, "is_blacklisted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_blacklisted" IN (0, 1)), "is_recently_added" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_recently_added" IN (0, 1)), "is_recently_updated" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_recently_updated" IN (0, 1)), "created" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_chapter_added" INTEGER NULL, "last_synced" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("id", "library_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series_metadata" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "series_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "summary" TEXT NULL, "age_rating" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT -1, "release_year" INTEGER NOT NULL, "language" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_updated" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("series_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series_covers" ("series_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "image" BLOB NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "people" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "genres" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tags" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series_people_roles" ("series_metadata_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series_metadata (id), "person_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES people (id), "role" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("series_metadata_id", "person_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series_genres" ("series_metadata_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series_metadata (id), "genre_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES genres (id), PRIMARY KEY ("series_metadata_id", "genre_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series_tags" ("series_metadata_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series_metadata (id), "tag_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tags (id), PRIMARY KEY ("series_metadata_id", "tag_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "volumes" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "series_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "min_number" REAL NOT NULL, "max_number" REAL NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NULL, "word_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "pages" INTEGER NOT NULL, "min_hours_to_read" INTEGER NULL, "max_hours_to_read" INTEGER NULL, "avg_hours_to_read" REAL NULL, "primary_color" TEXT NULL, "secondary_color" TEXT NULL, "created" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_modified" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("id", "series_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "volume_covers" ("volume_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES volumes (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "image" BLOB NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chapters" ("id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "volume_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES volumes (id), "series_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "title" TEXT NULL, "title_name" TEXT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "summary" TEXT NULL, "isbn" TEXT NULL, "format" TEXT NOT NULL, "language" TEXT NULL, "min_number" REAL NOT NULL, "max_number" REAL NOT NULL, "sort_order" REAL NOT NULL, "pages" INTEGER NOT NULL, "word_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "min_hours_to_read" INTEGER NULL, "max_hours_to_read" INTEGER NULL, "avg_hours_to_read" REAL NULL, "age_rating" INTEGER NULL, "primary_color" TEXT NULL, "secondary_color" TEXT NULL, "is_special" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_special" IN (0, 1)), "is_storyline" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_storyline" IN (0, 1)), "release_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_modified" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("id", "volume_id", "series_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chapter_covers" ("chapter_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chapters (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "image" BLOB NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reading_progress" ("chapter_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chapters (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "volume_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES volumes (id), "series_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series (id), "library_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES libraries (id), "pages_read" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "book_scroll_id" TEXT NULL, "total_reads" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "created" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "last_modified" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("dirty" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "book_chapters" ("chapter_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chapters (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "page" INTEGER NOT NULL, "parent_page" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id", "page", "title"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "want_to_read" ("series_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "is_want_to_read" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_want_to_read" IN (0, 1)), "dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("dirty" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "downloaded_pages" ("chapter_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES chapters (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "page" INTEGER NOT NULL, "data" BLOB NOT NULL, "created" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "last_sync" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id", "page"));
